projectDescription: A Minecraft mod that adds a Bard class with musical weapons, spells, armor sets, and magical effects for Fabric and NeoForge.
keyFeatures: Musical weapons including Rapiers, Lutes, and Lyres with spell-casting abilities
Bard armor sets with movement speed bonuses and spell power enhancements
Unique spells like Troubadour's Minuet, Magical Ballad, Encore, and Army's Paeon
Status effects that buff allies and debuff enemies through music
Cross-platform support for both Fabric and NeoForge mod loaders
Integration with spell engine and RPG systems
Configurable equipment stats and effect modifiers
Tiered progression system with materials from vanilla and modded content
publicApiSurface: BardsMod.registerItems() - Register all bard weapons and armor
Weapons.register() - Register weapon entries (Rapiers, Lutes, Lyres)
Armors.register() - Register armor sets (Entertainer, Troubadour, Storyteller)
BardsEffects.register() - Register status effects (Ballad, Minuet, Army's Paeon)
BardsSpells entries - Spell definitions (troubadours_minuet, magical_ballad, encore, armys_paeon)
